description.ko: 유기적인 식물과 사이버네틱 회로가 결합된 숨 막히는 광경으로, 가상 숲속에서 데이터 기반의 에너지를 뿜어내는 발광 식물들을 묘사합니다.
description.en: A breathtaking fusion of organic flora and cybernetic circuitry, where luminous plants pulse with data-driven energy in a virtual forest.

prompt: A hyper-realistic macro shot of a bioluminescent flower with translucent petals revealing glowing fiber-optic veins, set in a dense digital jungle of circuit-board ferns and holographic moss, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, neon teal and electric purple color palette, cybernetic nature aesthetic, intricate details.
